reviews.review_description:
Dont buy. It doesn't work and hasnt for a long time. Im played this game and thought it was pretty good but it stopped working completely. I just get errors.

- when i enter my hideout I get "its taking a long time to verify"

- when i try to start a game "matchmaking error" verbose code.

Its broken, dont buy. Ive uninstalled and reinstalled nothing, checked permissions still doesnt work, checked to make sure date and time on my headset was set to auto, nothing.

Fix ur game. The quest store has become a garbage dump for half-a*# programers to dump shovelware jank for a quick buck. Sadly this game has become one of those. 

Disappointing.......

Meta needs to remove games that have been abandoned from the store. Gross that you can buy a game that clearly has no servers.

reviews.review_title: Dont know if u can even play this game
reviews.review_description: Wont load me out of the hide out where u start the game.  Cant go on missions. Dont know if theres any servers anymore

This game is wonderful i only played one match and its already adicting but only one thing bother me that there were no people playing and thats really said. I just hope when this game comes out of early acsess it will be popular cause i think this game is really great and has a pot of potential.

(Edit and Update) Not sure if the devs of this game have abandoned it. Game wiped my profile and then assigned me a hexadecimal code for a player name. Everything got reset and wiped and broken. Really makes me sad. This game had so much potential.

Been playing for a good minute when the season 1 started...when it ended the timer restarted and nothing changed...came back a few days later still nothing changed...take a couple weeks..still on season 1 and now my data isn't sinking with the game...I think the devs gave up on this game...

This game is super cool since the update. And with the new updates coming up, it’s going to be super good. The graphics are great little choppy burst but it’s an early access game. I wish some of the other PVPve games were like this. Great job guys keep it up. Love the updates.
￼

I find this game interesting.  I know its in early access, and I haven't seen any other players, yet. But somehow it's very relaxing, and enjoyable. I love the map, lobby, and having goals to accomplish. Not really loving the location of the storage cube, I keep grabbing it, when reaching for my gun. Maybe there is a way to change it in setting, I just haven't seen it?

reviews.review_title: Way too early to release and no players
reviews.review_description:
Could have potential if devs dedicated everything into it. But im so use to seeing games not getting past early access release. I did not refund it so I'm a supporter. As of right now unlocking stuff as you get to level 40 is not anywhere near enough content for a game

Edit: never seen anyone months later and no update felt like it added enough pve

I’m really excited for this game and its developers. For an Early access title it’s got huge potential to be a truly epic extraction game. What there is now is already so much fun and I love the PVE aspect of the game. I’m not a big fan of PVP in my games and with this one it’s done so well that the PVE and PVP kind of just blend together. It could be that I’ve just only come across new or undergeared players so far but fighting NPCs and fighting other players feels the same and I haven’t felt frustrated or felt overwhelmed in any battles so far. 

The looting aspect to the game feels really satisfying. The only downside is you come across far too much loot and you end up filling your limited inventory space way too quickly, like within the first 5 mins of a match sometimes. 

I’m looking forward to the character customization being implemented and I hope they add some kind of armor or gear crafting. Achievement based cosmetics would be really nice as well. Please don’t make all the cool cosmetics micro transactions though! Nothing kills a game faster for me than having all the coolest cosmetics cost money. Sure you can have DLC and microtransactions to make some extra cash but at least give us some cool stuff to grind for through achievements or to craft with rare resources found in game.

I look forward to future updates and can’t wait to see what this game looks like a year from now, good job Devs! Keep up the good work!

reviews.review_title: Anomaly is a Must-Try Bargain for VR Ext
reviews.review_description:
As a veteran of extraction shooters, I have to say Anomaly is one of the most exciting and unique VR experiences out there. The core gameplay is intense, the atmosphere is immersive, and the mechanics really reward skill and strategy.

The new February update is a game-changer! The improvements to gunplay, movement, and overall balance make the experience even smoother and more engaging. It’s great to see the devs listening to the community and continuously refining the game.

For the price, this is an absolute steal! Anomaly has the potential to be one of the best VR extraction shooters out there, and at such a cheap price, this is a must-try. If you're a fan of the genre, don’t miss out!

This game is fun and has some really cool concepts.  It just works in every way.  The leveling, the loot the currency is all fun and unique to collect and use.  It’s a marathon not a sprint to get things unlocked, but that’s where the fun and the grind comes in.  Your up against some tough pve while trying to get loot, find keys and the all important relic, but don’t forget their are other players in the game also!! Very fun.  This game once polished will be amazing I am sure.  I can’t wait to see what this looks like at full launch and beyond.  I am a fan and can sing this games praises.  They have plenty of room to grow with new weapons, perks, attachments etc, the sky is the limit.  I have ideas just ask!! Great job guys, swarm was bad$$$ too!! Unique developer studio that makes sick games!

It can be entertaining. Definitely needs more updates to feel more complete etc, but looks like the devs are regularly doing so which is awesome to see. Seems like not many people play/know about this cause the times I've played it's just me and what seems like an endless supply of respawning too fast npcs, but hoping that changes. In a way I don't mind though cause there is something super chill about just lootin and shootin with music playing, and not having to be on high alert at all times like I do when I play contractors exfil or something. Def worth the 8 bucks if looter shooter extractors is your thing. Looking forward to seeing where this goes.

UPDATED REVIEW AFTER MONTHS: Still features placeholder cards, cumming soon sections, empty lobbies,poor controls, bad quality graphics, no players, no gameplay, just a poorly created room to walk around in then quit. No bots, no single player farming fishing crafting nothing. Waste of money and time

Yo this game is actually pretty sick!! So basically its like Hunt but in VR and with sci-fi stuff... honestly way better than I expected The gravity nades are cool and the ziplines feel sooooo smooth! Been playing with randoms and its actually super fun working together to take down these huge robot enemies - you gotta flank em and everything. Like yeah it’s early access but the gunplay already feels better than some “finished” games out there fr!

A fun extraction shooter that has a lot of potential to be great. It is still in early stages, enemies move fairly rigidly, and the environment could use some more visuals as well as better gun feedback and it also needs a true tutorial. So, look up some videos before jumping in. They are however, continually improving it and it has some fun mechanics for getting bigger loot drops. Looking forward to seeing where this goes and hopefully, turning it into a 5 star review.

I have been lucky enough to be part of development for a short time leading up to the early access release of Anomaly as a weekly tester.

I have seen this game become better and better over that time with a passionate group of developers, testers and a very supportive community!

Many people will draw comparisons to existing titles of the same genre like Tabor, Tarkov, Into the Radius and more recently Contractors ExfilZone.

But Anomaly is unique. Yes it may be a PvPvE shooter with the Exfiltration replayability loop. But it's level design, thematic setting, ominous enemies and challenging objectives set it apart from the others!

The environments are enriched with verticality which I absolutely love in VR! Ziplining between levels is a thrill in itself and must be experienced.

The enemies are a continuous threat that keeps you on your toes with each of them bringing a new and different challenge as they attempt to thwart your raids!

And then you gotta watch your back for enemy players looking to steal your vault tech you worked so hard to obtain....

If you are looking for something that does away with the usual Military visual style of shooter but want all the realism an exfiltration gun game can bring then look no further!

Anomaly is a fresh, fun, fast and furious experience that you won't regret buying! ❤️

A mixture between Ghost of Tabor and Into the Radius… Wasn't expecting much from early access, but Anomaly's actually pretty sweet! Nice mix of PvE and PvP without being super sweaty. Graphics are basic rn but the gameplay loop is solid - especially when you're working with your team.  I think this game will be in the 8 or 9 out of 10 area pretty soon. Worth picking up!

I’ve been playing Anomaly since early development and it has come a long way. I love how responsive and receptive the developer is with weekly updates and fixes. Anomaly is a brilliant early access game that’s so much fun. I’ve played five hours straight in just one session! I have the best time playing with friends in squads up to three players. 

There are three levels to explore and loot: ground level, below ground, and another level below that. Each level down is more challenging than the last. Find and collect loot, search for and collect keys to unlock the artifact, defeat the NPC enemy and other squads, collect the artifact, and evacuate. The ultimate challenge is collecting the artifacts from all three levels in one session. The game has a nice variety of weapons, upgrades, and consumables, along with daily, weekly, and seasonal challenges.  

Wow, what a great price for the amount of gameplay! Get it while you can and watch this game grow and become even better than it is now. I bet that the price will increase at full launch. Find and join Greensky Games’ Discord server to offer feedback and suggestions.

This game is very fun and unique so far! 
Being in early access, there are obviously still a few things that need tweaking, but overall the game loop is great! Having been an early tester of the game, I've experienced how the devs are hard at work, communicating with the community and continuously making improvements. Definitely a game you should keep your eye on. It's really worth it!

Ill admit that Im pretty new to the genre so I dont have much to compare to but......
Gear up and head to the field with a squad of up to 3 players (match making is in too)

Fight against both AI controlled enemies and turrents as well as other squads doing the same thing.
The goal to loot, loot and loot some more (killing anything that gets in your way)

Using your tracking tool you find "keys" "buff terminals" and the "deeper ziplines"

Buff terminals give you a perk for that round that range from faster armour regen, no fall damage and many more.
Finding 3 keys will trigger that layers Artifact extraction point to show up. Whilst the zip lines will allow you to descend deeper where bigger threats and bigger awards await.

Warning though everyone can see on their tracker when an artifact is active! Your team has to now get to that point fending off any other teams to extract the artfact.
Extaction consist of fending off waves of AI enemies for a period of time (and other players)

Then you have the goal of extacti g off the map without dying! As that extracted artifact will be a beacon on anyone other squads tracker!

Do you go for deeper Artifacts? One at a time? Or multiple (keep in mind carrying an artifact will mark you on the trackers for all to see.....ready to ambush you)

Back in the base you you can use items found on the field to craft attachments and upgrades for your weapons as well as better guns and perks for you character.

Ready for another go to extract more loot and to repeat the process.

Warning though.........if you die on the field you will lose everything (minus things slotted into you safe stash)

The game has a slight post apocalyptic futuristic  setting with its healing grenades and anti grav grenades.
The game is in Early Access at the moment but there is enough content to justiy its (low) asking price.

I cant wait to see how the team expands on the already great core game in the future.

This isn't hardcore like Tabor or Showdown Exfil and this is more laid back on the health and eating/hydration. The map is massive with 3 floors to it. If you need a challenge try the bottom floor raid for the 3rd artifact! It's worth the most and the best gear is there! Good luck
I’ve been playin solo it’s been great! The progression system feels balanced and rewarding.

reviews.review_title: VR Action Extraction at Its Best
reviews.review_description:
Anomaly is the ultimate high-stakes PvPvE extraction shooter, and even in Early Access, it’s shaping up to be something special. Playing in VR makes every moment thrilling, with its massive, atmospheric world keeping you on edge. The intensity spikes when you secure the coveted Artifact and become the target everyone is hunting.

The game shines in co-op, where teamwork and strategy are key. Deciding whether to take risks for rare loot or play it safe adds a layer of tension to every match. The customizable arsenal, from optics to tactical tools like deployable cover, allows for a personal approach to combat.

While some Early Access rough edges remain, the developers are making steady improvements. With its immersive environments, pulse-pounding gameplay, and incredible potential, Anomaly is already a standout VR experience.

Score: 8/10 (Early Access)
Thrilling and immersive, with loads of promise for the future.
One of the best shooters on Vr in my opinion

Really enjoying playing this game. The game loop is so fun and flexible. Sometimes I go in there for 10 minutes and extract really quickly and other times I'll spend 45 mins. It just makes me want to go back for more. Excited to see more updates!!
It’s great but I do solo and can’t find any players
I have played multiple shooting game this one looks different with different concept. Needs a bit of getting used to and understanding

reviews.review_title: Decent game - definitely worth the price
reviews.review_description: Title says it all really - but I'll digress a little. I was lucky enough to play test this game and was impressed back then - but it's come far since then - the new textures means the game looks much more impressive. I enjoy the gunplay, I think it's good and iron sights are quite accurate - and you can modify weapons. The gameplay loop is good, I find I can easily play two rounds easily without being bored. The people I've played with have been kind and I hope this welcoming community continues to be the case. For the price, I definitely think it's worth it. Even if you don't play it often, it's a good game to have in your library. At time of writing game is still in early access, so I'm looking forward to seeing how this game develops even more!

It takes Into the Radius, one of my Favorite game of all time and ever, and adds what Im good at, VR FPS! (Top 200 on the VAIL leaderboard so yes I am good now shut up)
Its a nice take for VR and Im ready to see whats gonna happen!
This game is great to play with friends I highly recommend. The gunplay is smooth, and the visuals are good! Thanks greensky for sending me a free copy

reviews.review_title: Goes Hard in concept and implementation
reviews.review_description: Loving this game so far, cant wait to see what comes next!
Greate game
Cant wait to see how this game develops past early access. Already tons of fun!
This game is awesome! Taking down enemies is super fun. the gunplay feels good! Definitely worth picking up!

Looks like itr, isn’t tabor 10/10, a fresh take from the boots in the ground extraction games that have been coming out for VR
(I could use the friend key)

developer_response.body: Thanks so much for the review!

reviews.review_description: super epic

reviews.review_title: Great start and can’t wait for more
reviews.review_description: After a few matches with other people and myself i am so excited to see how this will come together. Tons of fun and a great shooter ~
Game is pretty cool
The game is good and if you don't like the sweats in tabor get this. You can play with your friends and it's not a lot of gore so if you just want a casual extraction shooter get this.

this is game is set in a abandoned deserty map which has robots trying to kill and other people trying to collect keys than trying to collect the artifact having 3 different tiers collecting scrap and and getting upgraded gun
its also co-op getting to be in the same bunker before getting into the game.
this game is lacking features for now but eventually they'll add like the pda,
and to add different lobbies for people to have casual fun and for sweats.
I'd recommend this to people who want to have fun with friends
